serverInfo.name: AgentFolio SATP
serverInfo.description: Query AI agent trust scores, verifications, and reputation from the Solana Agent Trust Protocol (SATP). 200+ agents registered.

tools.name: check_trust
tools.description: Check trust score and verification level for any wallet or agent

tools.name: browse_agents
tools.description: Search 200+ AI agents by name, skill, or category

tools.name: verify_identity
tools.description: Check on-chain SATP identity data for a Solana wallet

tools.name: assess_agent
tools.description: Full trust assessment including verifications, reviews, on-chain data

tools.name: get_attestations
tools.description: List on-chain attestation history for an agent

tools.name: get_registry
tools.description: Full SATP agent registry with trust scores

tools.name: get_programs
tools.description: SATP Solana program IDs and network info
